prompt: A stark, photorealistic macro photograph of a massive, ancient tree stump cross-section resting on a bleak concrete floor. The concentric tree rings act as a natural timeline moving from the center outward. The innermost rings are densely packed, pristine, and richly textured, representing historical abundance. As the rings progress toward the outer edge, the wood becomes increasingly hollowed, splintered, and eroded. The outermost rings are almost completely destroyed, leaving jagged fragments over empty space. Harsh dramatic overhead lighting, deep shadows, raw documentary style, no text, no labels, no charts.
dataset_name: Global Forest Change Dataset (Hansen et al.)
insight: Forest loss has accelerated in recent decades, leaving dramatically reduced ecological volume compared to historical baselines.
